name: Convex
description: Convex is a reactive backend-as-a-service platform. Use this API to run queries, mutations, and actions against your Convex deployment, enabling real-time data operations without managing infrastructure.

capabilities.name: run_query
capabilities.description: Execute a read-only query function against your Convex backend.

capabilities.name: run_mutation
capabilities.description: Execute a mutation function that can read and write data.

capabilities.name: run_action
capabilities.description: Execute an action function that can call external services and APIs.

capabilities.name: import_data
capabilities.description: Import data into your Convex tables from JSON.
